nasb.text: They will incite a crowd against you and they will stone you and cut you to pieces with their swords.

esv.text: They shall bring up a crowd against you, and they shall stone you and cut you to pieces with their swords.

cnv.text: 他們必帶一大群人上來攻擊你，用石頭打死你，用他們的刀把你砍碎。

ccb.text: 他们要聚众攻击你，用石头打你，用刀剑砍碎你，
